cards.name: Push Hard
cards.rulesText: Gain 2 positions but increase tire wear by 15.

cards.name: Box Box
cards.rulesText: Pit stop: reset tire wear to 10, lose 3 positions.

cards.name: Conserve Tires
cards.rulesText: Reduce tire wear by 10 but lose 1 position.

cards.name: Fuel Save
cards.rulesText: Save fuel by 15, lose 1 position from slower pace.

cards.name: Overtake
cards.rulesText: Aggressive move: gain 3 positions, +20 tire wear, +10 fuel.

cards.name: Defend Position
cards.rulesText: Hold position. +5 tire wear from defensive driving.

cards.name: Wet Setup
cards.rulesText: Reduce rain impact: -3 rain meter, +5 tire wear.

cards.name: Dry Setup
cards.rulesText: Optimize for dry: gain 1 position, -5 tire wear. +2 rain meter risk.

cards.name: Undercut
cards.rulesText: Early pit strategy: gain 2 positions, -60 tire wear, +5 fuel.

cards.name: Overcut
cards.rulesText: Stay out longer: gain 1 position, +10 tire wear, -5 fuel.

cards.name: DRS Attack
cards.rulesText: Use DRS to gain 2 positions, +10 tire wear.

cards.name: Slipstream
cards.rulesText: Draft behind rival: gain 1 position, -5 fuel.

cards.name: Engine Mode
cards.rulesText: High power mode: gain 2 positions, +15 fuel consumption.

cards.name: Track Position
cards.rulesText: Maintain clean air: -10 tire wear, -5 fuel.

cards.name: Gap Management
cards.rulesText: Manage the gap: -5 tire wear. No position change.

cards.name: Late Brake
cards.rulesText: Risky late braking: gain 2 positions, +15 tire wear.

cards.name: Alternate Strategy
cards.rulesText: Switch strategy: -20 tire wear, -10 fuel, lose 1 position.
